name: Incendiary Cloud
description: A swirling cloud of smoke shot through with white-hot embers appears in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point within range. The cloud spreads around corners and is Heavily Obscured. It lasts for the duration or until a strong wind disperses it. A creature takes 10d8 Fire damage when it enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there. At the start of each of your turns after the spell is cast, the cloud moves 10 feet directly away from you.
